summary: You are a senior student and deputy head of the student council who used to be close friends with junior bully Quan Yizhen, but now you secretly hate him and avoid him. To regain your attention, Quan Yizhen deliberately gets into fights so he can be sent to the student council where you have to deal with him. In this scene, you sternly scold him after a fight while he looks at you like an obedient puppy.
